'''kamasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qite|qite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qite|qite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kamasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæmæsæth|kæmæsæth]] || [[word:kæmæsæj|kæmæsæj]] || [[word:kæmæsæsh|kæmæsæsh]] || [[word:kæmæsæ|kæmæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kamamasath|kamamasath]] || [[word:kamamasaj|kamamasaj]] || [[word:kamamasash|kamamasash]] || [[word:kamamasa|kamamasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kamasath|kamasath]] || [[word:kamasaj|kamasaj]] || [[word:kamasash|kamasash]] || [[word:kamasa|kamasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kamafsath|kamafsath]] || [[word:kamafsaj|kamafsaj]] || [[word:kamafsash|kamafsash]] || [[word:kamafsaf|kamafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kamasatha|kamasatha]] || [[word:kamasaja|kamasaja]] || [[word:kamasasha|kamasasha]] || [[word:kamasaka|kamasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kamasath|kamasath]] || [[word:kamasaj|kamasaj]] || [[word:kamasash|kamasash]] || [[word:kamasa|kamasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kamasathal|kamasathal]] || [[word:kamasajal|kamasajal]] || [[word:kamasashal|kamasashal]] || [[word:kamasakal|kamasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kamasathatha|kamasathatha]] || [[word:kamasajaja|kamasajaja]] || [[word:kamasashasha|kamasashasha]] || [[word:kamasaka|kamasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kamasathan|kamasathan]] || [[word:kamasajan|kamasajan]] || [[word:kamasashan|kamasashan]] || [[word:kamasakan|kamasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kamasathaoro|kamasathaoro]] || [[word:kamasajaoro|kamasajaoro]] || [[word:kamasashaoro|kamasashaoro]] || [[word:kamasakaoro|kamasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
